_comment: Invalid: source license is 'All Rights Reserved' / commercial-only, which USML §7.5 forbids translating without explicit licensing agreement. A USML Source Adapter MUST NOT emit this Pattern. The Source Adapter conformance test asserts that license clearance rejects this case before emission.
name: @example/pattern-borrowed
description: Test fixture demonstrating license-clearance failure: source pattern is from a commercial-only design system (Tailwind UI hypothetical analog).

source.license: All Rights Reserved — Commercial-Only — no derivative works permitted
